yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Google_fixes_Chrome_zeroday_with_inthewi {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Google fixes Chrome zero-day with in-the-wild exploit (CVE-2026-5281)"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-01"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-5281" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Major_Cyber_Attacks_in_March_2026_OAuth_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Major Cyber Attacks in March 2026: OAuth Phishing, SVG Smuggling, Magecart, and "
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-01"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Malicious_Script_That_Gets_Rid_of_ADS_We {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Malicious Script That Gets Rid of ADS, (Wed, Apr 1st)"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-01"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_TeamPCP_Supply_Chain_Campaign_Update_005 {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 005 - First Confirmed Victim Disclosure, P"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-01"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-CYB-01" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202622767__Dell_AppSync_Symlink_Follo {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-22767 - Dell AppSync Symlink Following Information Disclosure Vulnerabi"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-01"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-22767" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "AppSync" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202622768__Dell_AppSync_Privilege_Esc {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-22768 - Dell AppSync Privilege Escalation Vulnerability"
        severity = "high"

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 117 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 117 as HIGH risk. 41 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-CYB-01, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
